commentary_text: The model favors Turkey at 38% while the market favors USA at 46%, a 15-percentage-point gap on the USA win outcome. This reversal of favorites may reflect the market pricing in recent form, lineup news, or injury status that post-dates the model's last update. The model also assigns draw probability notably higher than the market does—31% versus 24%—suggesting either systematic differences in how each framework models close matches or real-time information the model cannot access. The dashboard flags these divergences as signals worth monitoring rather than verdicts on accuracy.
